<!--

classDiagram
class wp_commentmeta{
 *BIGINT meta_id NOT NULL
   BIGINT comment_id NOT NULL
   VARCHAR<255> COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" meta_key
   LONGTEXT meta_value
}
class wp_comments{
 *BIGINT comment_ID NOT NULL
   VARCHAR<255> COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" comment_agent NOT NULL
   VARCHAR<20> COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" comment_approved NOT NULL
   TINYTEXT comment_author NOT NULL
   VARCHAR<100> COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" comment_author_IP NOT NULL
   VARCHAR<100> COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" comment_author_email NOT NULL
   VARCHAR<200> COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" comment_author_url NOT NULL
   TEXT COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" comment_content NOT NULL
   DATETIME comment_date NOT NULL
   DATETIME comment_date_gmt NOT NULL
   INTEGER comment_karma NOT NULL
   BIGINT comment_parent NOT NULL
   BIGINT comment_post_ID NOT NULL
   VARCHAR<20> COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" comment_type NOT NULL
   BIGINT user_id NOT NULL
}
class wp_links{
 *BIGINT link_id NOT NULL
   VARCHAR<255> COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" link_description NOT NULL
   VARCHAR<255> COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" link_image NOT NULL
   VARCHAR<255> COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" link_name NOT NULL
   MEDIUMTEXT link_notes NOT NULL
   BIGINT link_owner NOT NULL
   INTEGER link_rating NOT NULL
   VARCHAR<255> COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" link_rel NOT NULL
   VARCHAR<255> COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" link_rss NOT NULL
   VARCHAR<25> COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" link_target NOT NULL
   DATETIME link_updated NOT NULL
   VARCHAR<255> COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" link_url NOT NULL
   VARCHAR<20> COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" link_visible NOT NULL
}
class wp_options{
 *BIGINT option_id NOT NULL
   VARCHAR<20> COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" autoload NOT NULL
   VARCHAR<191> COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" option_name NOT NULL
   LONGTEXT option_value NOT NULL
}
class wp_postmeta{
 *BIGINT meta_id NOT NULL
   VARCHAR<255> COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" meta_key
   LONGTEXT meta_value
   BIGINT post_id NOT NULL
}
class wp_posts{
 *BIGINT ID NOT NULL
   BIGINT comment_count NOT NULL
   VARCHAR<20> COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" comment_status NOT NULL
   VARCHAR<255> COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" guid NOT NULL
   INTEGER menu_order NOT NULL
   VARCHAR<20> COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" ping_status NOT NULL
   TEXT COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" pinged NOT NULL
   BIGINT post_author NOT NULL
   LONGTEXT post_content NOT NULL
   LONGTEXT post_content_filtered NOT NULL
   DATETIME post_date NOT NULL
   DATETIME post_date_gmt NOT NULL
   TEXT COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" post_excerpt NOT NULL
   VARCHAR<100> COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" post_mime_type NOT NULL
   DATETIME post_modified NOT NULL
   DATETIME post_modified_gmt NOT NULL
   VARCHAR<200> COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" post_name NOT NULL
   BIGINT post_parent NOT NULL
   VARCHAR<255> COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" post_password NOT NULL
   VARCHAR<20> COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" post_status NOT NULL
   TEXT COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" post_title NOT NULL
   VARCHAR<20> COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" post_type NOT NULL
   TEXT COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" to_ping NOT NULL
}
class wp_term_relationships{
 *BIGINT object_id NOT NULL
   *BIGINT term_taxonomy_id NOT NULL
   INTEGER term_order NOT NULL
}
class wp_term_taxonomy{
 *BIGINT term_taxonomy_id NOT NULL
   BIGINT count NOT NULL
   LONGTEXT description NOT NULL
   BIGINT parent NOT NULL
   VARCHAR<32> COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" taxonomy NOT NULL
   BIGINT term_id NOT NULL
}
class wp_termmeta{
 *BIGINT meta_id NOT NULL
   VARCHAR<255> COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" meta_key
   LONGTEXT meta_value
   BIGINT term_id NOT NULL
}
class wp_terms{
 *BIGINT term_id NOT NULL
   VARCHAR<200> COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" name NOT NULL
   VARCHAR<200> COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" slug NOT NULL
   BIGINT term_group NOT NULL
}
class wp_usermeta{
 *BIGINT umeta_id NOT NULL
   VARCHAR<255> COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" meta_key
   LONGTEXT meta_value
   BIGINT user_id NOT NULL
}
class wp_users{
 *BIGINT ID NOT NULL
   VARCHAR<250> COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" display_name NOT NULL
   VARCHAR<255> COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" user_activation_key NOT NULL
   VARCHAR<100> COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" user_email NOT NULL
   VARCHAR<60> COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" user_login NOT NULL
   VARCHAR<50> COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" user_nicename NOT NULL
   VARCHAR<255> COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" user_pass NOT NULL
   DATETIME user_registered NOT NULL
   INTEGER user_status NOT NULL
   VARCHAR<100> COLLATE "utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci" user_url NOT NULL
}


-->
